roa.docketEntryComment: DA DECLAR RET PURS 1381 DEMAND&ORD TO RET DEF TO SF FROM ALAMEDA FILED
/CAL APD MTR HRG/MTR-APD/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVSA 05-18-09/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ:1 Y/ADDL CTS:1 Y/CTORD:PROBATION IN #1991705 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS UNSUCCESSFUL/

/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 1 Y/WS/WEAP/DOMV//X:DOMESTIC VIOLENCE COUNSELING SHALL BE FOR A PERIOD OF 1 YEAR,/DOMVF/DTC/LF/DNA/RESTV/X:SENTENCE MODIFIED BY THE COURT://X:DEFENDANT IS TO REMAIN IN CUSTODY TO 09-01-2002; VICTIM IS MOVING OUT OFCALIFORNIA ON THAT DATE,/X:BY STIPULATION OF COUNSEL, DEFENDANT'S PRIOR CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED IS 319 DAYS,/CTWP:319/PJ:123D/DEFENDANT WILL RECEIVENO CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED/X:DEFENDANT TO BE RELEASED SEPTEMBER 01, 2002/SA2:NICOLE HODGE/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/OBEY/ACCEP/

/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1/REMA/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:6-11-02/DISPO/X:ISS; PROB 3 Y; 12 MONTHS CJ; CTS AT SENTENCE; ONE YEAR DV COUNSELING; WS;NO WEAPONS; VIF $200; $200 DV FUND; DTC; DNA TESTING; STAY AWAY FROM NICOLE HODGE; RESTITUTION TO VICTIM/X:PC; PSR;   /         /X:ALLEGATIONS STRICKEN,/SENTENCING/PRES:6-10-02/

/X:DEFENDANT PREVIOUSLY RELEASED TO TAKE CARE OF MATTERS WITH ALAMEDA COURTS,/X:A BENCH WARRANT WAS TO HAVE ISSUED TO RETURN DEFENDANT FROM ALAMEDA TOSAN FRANCISCO,/X:THAT WAS NOT DONE,/X:DEFENDANT IS PRESENT TODAY HAVINGNOTIFIED HIS COUNSEL THAT HE HAD NOT BEEN RETURNED TO SAN FRANCISCO,/BWR:03-11-2002/BWR1/SIGN2/SHER/BAIL:75,000/
/TEXT TRANS TO DEPT 26//TRANS 26:FORTHWITH FOR MOTION TO RECALL BW AND PRETRIAL/WD GTW/TWWD:05-06-2002/CO:LAST DAY FOR TRIAL 07-05-2002/

/X:SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS STATED FOR THE RECORD; NO DISPOSITION,//X:LETTER RECEIVED BY THE COURT PROVIDED TO DEFENSE COUNSEL; NO MARSDEN HEARING WILL BE HELD,/X:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE HELD IN CHAMBERS,/X:COURT MAKES OBSERVATIONS REGARDING 995 MOTION,/X:COUNSEL ARE DIRECTED TO CONTACT ALAMEDA COUNTY IN AN ATTEMPT TO COORDINATE A DISPOSITION,/CONTD:FURTHER PRETRIALCONFERENCE/

/CAL: APD MTR HRG/CONTD: TO SET APD HRG/DOP/

CONTD SUPP RPT ON APD MTR/APD-MTR/WIAMTR/SUPP:06-02-09/PROB ADM REV/SHER/NB/S15/CTORD:APD TO FORWARD REPORT TO RESPECTIVE DEPARTMENT/
/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/CON: JEREMY BLANK/BWDC1: 2/BWCTS: 2/PROB ADMREV/NB/VD: HEARING DATE OF 05-15-09/CONTD: APD MTR FILING/
/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDAN, BENCH WARRANT REMAINS OUTSTANDING/
/LD:02-25-2002/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 21/TRANS 21:FORTHWITH FOR TRIAL//DEF 170,6JUD:BENSON/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 17/TRANS 17:02-19-2002 FOR TRIAL/
/CTORD:CAUSE DEEMED PRETRIED/TEXT:CAUSE IS ORDERED RETURNED TO DEPT 22//RET22/
/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 23/TRANS 23:FORTHWITH FOR MARSDEN MOTION//MO:IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE/
